reason: Browser Use feature: Agent successfully opens browser, navigates to URL, retrieves page title, and reports result in chat

Clicked on agent "QA-20260424-025829-ry2e" in sidebar - Agent interface opened showing empty chat window with message input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field - Message text successfully entered in textbox
Clicked Send message button - Message was sent and agent status changed to "working" with subtitle "Browser Navigation and Page Title Retrieval"
Waited for response (30 seconds) - Agent completed task after 11 seconds and returned response: "The page title is Example Domain."
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." in bold text
